description_long: This is a simple, straight ladder constructed from a light brown wood, featuring two vertical side rails and six evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The side rails are slightly wider than the rungs and have a rectangular profile, providing stability and grip. The rungs are flat and parallel, designed to support the weight of a person climbing. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails, giving it a traditional, utilitarian appearance. The wood surface appears smooth and matte, with a natural finish that highlights the grain. This ladder is suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or for outdoor maintenance tasks.
description: A straight, wooden ladder with six evenly spaced rungs and rectangular side rails, finished in a natural light brown. The design is simple and utilitarian, with a smooth, matte wood surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing both side rails and all six horizontal rungs clearly.
description_view_1: Side view showing the ladder as a thin vertical line, with rungs not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying both side rails and all rungs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the ladder as a thin vertical line with no rungs visible.
